reasoning: FSIS recalls typically take several months (often over 200-300 days) to be formally closed. This is due to the time required for retrieving or disposing of the product, conducting mandatory effectiveness checks, and completing administrative processes. A recall involving 65,000 pounds of food products sent to retail generally cannot be fully verified and administratively closed within a brief ~68-day window (April 24 to July 1). It is highly probable the recall will still be listed as Active on the FSIS website on July 1.
